craigslist.title: 3BR/2BA Rental - Modern & Spacious
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This well-appointed home offers four generously sized bedrooms, each filled with natural light and designed for comfortable everyday living. The primary bedroom includes convenient access to a private half bath, while a full bathroom is centrally located to serve the remaining bedrooms and main living areas. The thoughtful layout provides a balance of openness and privacy, keeping shared spaces easily accessible while maintaining separation for rest and retreat. Step outside to a wide rear patio that stretches across the back of the home, overlooking a spacious yard framed by mature greenery. This outdoor area offers plenty of flexibility—whether you’re envisioning a relaxing seating area, outdoor dining space, or room to entertain. With its functional floor plan, refreshed interior, and convenient location near Ladson, Summerville, and Charleston amenities, this home delivers a comfortable blend of space, livability, and everyday convenience.
